steps.t: There are many shop owners in Woodhurst. Gifemund has asked you to speak with the healer, supplier, provisioner, and the innkeeper on his behalf.
Herubrand is in the cellar of the farm-house. Herubrand would be interested to hear of the offer being made by Gifemund to the merchants of Woodhurst.
Gifemund awaits your return in the ore refinery. Gifemund will be interested to hear the answers to his offer.
